title: Assistant Store Manager - GAP India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - GAP India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with GAP India! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Srinagar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About GAP India:
GAP India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GAP India!
